flow_steps.description: Open the Kinsite login form and submit the provided credentials

actions.selector: input[type='email'], input[autocomplete='username'], input[name*='user' i], input[name*='email' i], input[id*='user' i], input[id*='email' i], input[placeholder*='user' i], input[placeholder*='email' i], input[aria-label*='user' i], input[aria-label*='email' i], input:not([type='password']):visible
actions.description: Enter the Kinsite user name / email

actions.selector: input[type='password'], input[autocomplete='current-password'], input[name*='password' i], input[id*='password' i], input[placeholder*='password' i], input[aria-label*='password' i]
button:has-text('Sign In'), button:has-text('Login'), button:has-text('Log In'), button[type='submit'], input[type='submit'], [role='button']:has-text('Sign In')

flow_steps.description: Allow manual intervention for MFA, captcha, consent, or redirect issues before exploration

actions.description: If authentication needs user intervention, complete it manually and let the scan resume
actions.instructions: If captcha, MFA, consent, SSO confirmation, or a broken redirect blocks automation, complete the login manually in the open browser. The scanner will resume once a post-login screen is visible, and all user-driven route changes during this step will still be recorded for reporting.

flow_steps.description: Explore the authenticated Kinsite experience across menus, tabs, reports, settings, and detail pages

actions.description: Explore the authenticated Kinsite application deeply, covering dashboards, menus, reports, transactions, profile/settings, support/help, popups, drawers, tables, filters, and nested detail views

exploration_profile.persona: Behave like a real authenticated Kinsite user. Prioritize the main business workflow areas first: dashboard, portfolio views, transactions, reports, statements, profile/account, settings, help/support, and detail pages opened from tables, cards, and summaries. Explore major sections the way a human would, not just any clickable label.
journey_rules: Open at least one detail row from each major table or card-based section before leaving it.
After reaching a dashboard or report section, inspect sibling tabs, date filters, drawers, and related detail views.
Prefer authenticated business workflows over generic help or legal routes once logged in.
